headline: Is United Parcel Service (UPS) Undervalued On Its Index Inclusion And Share Price Rebound?
summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) has been added to the Russell 1000 Value Defensive Index and the Russell 1000 Defensive Index, drawing fresh attention to how the stock fits into portfolios focused on resilience. See our latest analysis for United Parcel Service. Index inclusion comes after a period where United Parcel Service’s share price return has been firming, with a 90-day share price return of 8.89% and a year-to-date share price return of 9.62%.
